debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

failed_attempts:
use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
  intro f g hfg
  have h1 : f ≠ g := hfg
  have h2 : (⟨f, true⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 ≠ (⟨g, true⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 := by
    intro h
    apply h1
    simpa using h
  refine' ⟨h2, _⟩
  intro t
  have h3 : f ≠ g := hfg
  have h4 : (f : ℕ) ≠ (g : ℕ) := by
    intro h
    apply h3
    exact Fin.ext h
  have h5 : (points f).1 ≠ (points f).2 := hpoints f
  have h6 : (points g).1 ≠ (points g).2 := hpoints g
  -- Use the properties of the problem to show that the frogs do not meet
  have h7 : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 ≠ lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
    by_contra h
    -- If the frogs meet, then we have a contradiction with the given conditions
    have h8 := lineMap_eq_iff f g h3 ⟨(interAlong f (clap true t)).1, (interAlong f (clap true t)).2⟩ ⟨(interAlong g (clap true t)).1, (interAlong g (clap true t)).2⟩
    simp_all [clap_def]
    <;>
    (try { contradiction }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [Set.Ioo, Fin.ext_iff] }) <;>
    (try { norm_num at * }) <;>
    (try { linarith }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [Set.Ioo, Fin.ext_iff] }) <;>
    (try { norm_num at * }) <;>
    (try { linarith }) <;>
    (try { aesop })
  simpa [clap_def] using h7

use fun i => ⟨i, false⟩
  intro f g hfg
  have h₁ : f ≠ g := hfg
  have h₂ : (⟨f, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 ≠ (⟨g, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 := by
    intro h
    apply h₁
    simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using h
  constructor
  · exact h₂
  intro t
  have h₃ : lineMap (points (⟨f, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1).1 (points (⟨f, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1).2 (interAlong (⟨f, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 (clap (⟨f, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).2 t)).1 ≠ lineMap (points (⟨g, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1).1 (points (⟨g, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1).2 (interAlong (⟨g, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 (clap (⟨g, false⟩ : Fin n × Bool).2 t)).1 := by
    intro h
    have h₄ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap false t)).1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap false t)).1 := by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using h
    have h₅ : False := by
      have h₆ := lineMap_eq_iff f g h₁ (interAlong f (clap false t)) (interAlong g (clap false t))
      have h₇ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap false t)).1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap false t)).1 := h₄
      have h₈ : (interAlong f (clap false t) : Set.Ioo 0 1) = interAlong f (clap false t) := rfl
      have h₉ : (interAlong g (clap false t) : Set.Ioo 0 1) = interAlong g (clap false t) := rfl
      have h₁₀ : (interAlong f (clap false t) : Set.Ioo 0 1) = interAlong f (clap false t) := rfl
      have h₁₁ : (interAlong g (clap false t) : Set.Ioo 0 1) = interAlong g (clap false t) := rfl
      simp_all [clap_def]
      <;>
      (try cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, parity_simps, Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_zero]) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try aesop)
    exact h₅
  exact h₃

have h₁ : n % 2 = 1 := by
    cases' hn with k hk
    omega
  
  -- Choose all frogs to start at the first segment, moving forward.
  use fun i => ⟨⟨0, by omega⟩, false⟩
  intro f g hfg
  simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try {
    exfalso
    apply hfg
    <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
    <;> omega
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    intro t
    have h₂ := lineMap_eq_iff f g ‹_› (interAlong f _) (interAlong g _)
    simp_all [lineMap_eq_iff, Function.Embedding.coeFn_eq]
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Set.Ioo]
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      linarith
    })
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    aesop
  })

use fun i => (i, false)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · intro h
    apply hfg
    simpa using h
  intro t
  have h₁ := lineMap_eq_iff f g (by intro h; apply hfg; simp_all [Fin.ext_iff])
    ((interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, by intro h; apply hfg; simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) )) )
    ((interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, by intro h; apply hfg.symm; simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) )) )
  have h₂ := h₁
  simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
  (try aesop)

use fun i => (i, true)
  intro f g hfg
  have h₁ : (f : Fin n) ≠ (g : Fin n) := hfg
  have h₂ : ∀ t : Fin (n - 1 : ℕ),
    lineMap (points (f : Fin n)).1 (points (f : Fin n)).2 (interAlong (f : Fin n) (clap true t)).1 ≠
    lineMap (points (g : Fin n)).1 (points (g : Fin n)).2 (interAlong (g : Fin n) (clap true t)).1 := by
    intro t
    have h₃ : lineMap (points (f : Fin n)).1 (points (f : Fin n)).2 (interAlong (f : Fin n) (clap true t)).1 ≠
      lineMap (points (g : Fin n)).1 (points (g : Fin n)).2 (interAlong (g : Fin n) (clap true t)).1 := by
      intro h
      have h₄ := lineMap_eq_iff f g h₁
      have h₅ : (interAlong (f : Fin n) (clap true t) : Set.Ioo 0 (1 : ℝ)) = interAlong (f : Fin n) (clap true t) := rfl
      have h₆ : (interAlong (g : Fin n) (clap true t) : Set.Ioo 0 (1 : ℝ)) = interAlong (g : Fin n) (clap true t) := rfl
      have h₇ := h₄ (interAlong (f : Fin n) (clap true t)) (interAlong (g : Fin n) (clap true t))
      simp only [h₅, h₆] at h₇
      simp_all [h₅, h₆, interAlong, Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try linarith)
    exact h₃
  exact ⟨by simp_all [Fin.ext_iff], h₂⟩
